title: Release 1.8.0: bump + render + manifest + onboard + verify + commit + tag + push
action: Standard release flow: bump_version 1.8.0; render_plugin_skill_trees FIRST then release_manifest --write (the recurring gotcha — bump writes the manifest before any render); self-onboard --apply --repo-hooks; run_verify FOREGROUND green; stage everything EXCEPT .claude/settings.json; commit with cell id; annotated tag v1.8.0; push origin main --tags; then confirm exact-tag CI green on both workflows.
